name: iSpot.tv
description: TV ad measurement and attribution platform providing cross-screen analytics on 83M smart TVs and set-top boxes for brands and networks.

seo.title: iSpot.tv — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: iSpot.tv: TV ad measurement and attribution platform providing cross-screen analytics on 83M smart TVs and set-top boxes for brands and networks.

when_to_use: TV ad attribution linking commercial airings to digital and app engagement
Cross-screen measurement on 83M smart TVs and set-top boxes for advertisers
Real-time TV campaign performance dashboard for brand media teams
Measuring app store search lift and install impact from TV ad exposure

pros: Huge smart-TV panel for TV ad measurement
Cross-screen attribution down to brand outcomes
Accepted as a TV measurement currency
cons: TV-centric — limited direct value for mobile-only
Mobile app attribution not its core
review.verdict: Strong US TV measurement platform, but it is TV-first and not a mobile install attribution tool.
review.best_for: US brands measuring linear and CTV ad performance across screens.
review.not_for: International or mobile-only app marketers needing SKAN and install postbacks.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
